name: planhat-mcp
description: Talk to your Planhat customer data in plain English — 60 tools across 12 CRM resource types.
long_description: Connects Planhat, the customer success platform, to Claude. List, inspect, create, update and delete companies, contacts, opportunities, notes, conversations, users, assets, issues, tickets, tasks, licenses and invoices — directly from the conversation. Runs entirely on your machine and talks only to api.planhat.com with your own API token.

planhat_token.title: Planhat API token
planhat_token.description: Created in Planhat under Settings → Service Accounts (Private Apps) → API Access Token. Stored securely in your system keychain.

read_only.title: Read-only mode
read_only.description: Only allow reading Planhat data — no creating, updating or deleting.

disable_delete.title: Disable delete tools
disable_delete.description: Allow reading, creating and updating, but never deleting records.
